allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix camera & location permissions with Capacitor plugins

- Install @capacitor/camera and @capacitor/geolocation for native Android
- Add ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION to AndroidManifest.xml
- Hybrid useCamera: getUserMedia live stream + Camera.getPhoto\(\) fallback
- useGeoLocation: Capacitor native on Android, browser API on web
- Add ErrorBoundary component, wrap Attendance page
- CameraFeed handles fallback photo mode when no live stream
- Add root CLAUDE.md with git workflow instructions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix live camera preview on Android by removing Capacitor Camera.requestPermissions\(\) call

The Capacitor Camera plugin''s requestPermissions\(\) was interfering with
the WebView''s own getUserMedia\(\) permission flow. Removing it lets
BridgeWebChromeClient handle the Android permission dialog natively.
Also added RECORD_AUDIO and MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGS permissions for
devices that bundle audio with video capture requests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
